headline: Barclays Raises its Price Target on Western Digital (WDC)
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks with Huge Upside Potential. On May 27, 2026, Barclays analyst Tom O’Malley raised the firm’s price target on Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) to $620 from $450 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares.
